name: Make-Ahead Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, seed, and coarsely chop cucumber.
2. Seed and dice green pepper.
3. Peel and coarsely chop large tomatoes.
4. Thinly slice green onions (including tops).
5. In a 3-quart pan over medium heat, combine vegetable stock, tomato juice, lemon juice, green taco sauce, sugar, garlic powder, and pepper.
6. Leave the pan uncovered and bring to a boil.
7. Stir in cucumber, green pepper, tomatoes, and onion; bring mixture to a boil again.
8. Remove from heat and let cool.
9. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled.
Serving Size: 1 cup
Per Serving: 3 grams protein, 14 grams carbohydrates, no cholesterol, 64 calories.
An easy make-ahead soup to begin a meal with.
